translated.name: CCTV Camera
translated.description: A CCTV Camera system can be used for realtime surveillance and security around your base when powered and paired with the Computer Station.

translated.name: Electric Fuse
translated.description: An unreliable electric fuse. Will allow electrical passthrough for a period of time.

translated.name: Gears
translated.description: A selection of gears. Some functional, some not.

translated.name: Metal Blade
translated.description: A Metal Blade for making melee weapons.

translated.name: Metal Spring
translated.description: A metal spring. Used to provide motion or resistance in objects.

translated.name: Rifle Body
translated.description: The firing mechanism of a rifle. Used in construction of a weapon that can fire 5.56 ammo fully automatic.

translated.name: Road Signs
translated.description: Some road signs made of metal.

translated.name: Semi Automatic Body
translated.description: The firing mechanism of a semi automatic weapon.

translated.name: Sewing Kit
translated.description: A Sewing kit. Used to make advanced clothing.

translated.name: SMG Body
translated.description: The firing mechanism of a submachinegun. Used in construction of a weapon that can fire pistol ammo fully automatic.

translated.name: Targeting Computer
translated.description: A computer loaded with software that can analyze a video and produce rotational deltas to individual objects contained in the feed.

translated.name: Tech Trash
translated.description: A collection of random tech parts.
